_readme: Home-screen tiles. Edit names/descriptions freely — the app reads this file fresh on every page load. 'link' starting with #/ opens a Hub page; a full http link opens in a new tab (external: true).

tiles.name: Referral Letters
tiles.description: Write GP reports and specialist letters

tiles.name: Google Reviews
tiles.description: How many review invitations went out this week

tiles.name: Orders & Collections
tiles.description: Recent orders digest and jobs ready to collect

tiles.name: Stock Orders
tiles.description: Check suggested stock orders and approve them
